name: WT
description: Unmodified iCre1355 gapfilled model. No heterologous genes added.

name: SQE_Bb
description: Single SQE overexpression — B. braunii BbSQE (BBa_25UAU0L9). Best ecFBA candidate.

name: SQE_Cf
description: Single SQE overexpression — C. reinhardtii native CrSQE (BBa_25FZTRN6). Locus Cre17.g734644.

name: SQE_Sc
description: Single SQE overexpression — S. cerevisiae ERG1 codon-optimised for Cre (BBa_25FKDZGJ).

name: SQS_Sc
description: Single SQS overexpression — S. cerevisiae ERG9 (BBa_25BB8433).

name: SQS_Cl
description: Single SQS overexpression — C. reinhardtii native CrSQS (BBa_25C1BLRU). Locus Cre03.g175250.

name: SQS_Tv
description: Single SQS overexpression — T. vestitus thermostable SQS (BBa_25QH9X66). KEGG tll1448.

name: SQS_Sc_SQE_Bb
description: Dual overexpression — S. cerevisiae SQS + B. braunii SQE.

name: SQS_Sc_SQE_Cf
description: Dual overexpression — S. cerevisiae SQS + C. reinhardtii native SQE overexpression.

name: SQS_Sc_SQE_Sc
description: Dual overexpression — S. cerevisiae SQS + S. cerevisiae SQE.

name: SQS_Cl_SQE_Bb
description: Dual overexpression — C. reinhardtii native SQS + B. braunii SQE.

name: SQS_Tv_SQE_Bb
description: Dual overexpression — T. vestitus SQS + B. braunii SQE.

name: SQE_Bb_MVA
description: B. braunii SQE + full MVA module (MVAS+MVAE+MVK+PMK+MVAD+IDLI).

name: SQS_Sc_MVA
description: S. cerevisiae SQS + full MVA module.

name: SQS_Sc_SQE_Bb_MVA
description: Full stack — S. cerevisiae SQS + B. braunii SQE + MVA module. Primary high-flux candidate.

name: SQS_Tv_SQE_Bb_MVA
description: Full stack — T. vestitus SQS + B. braunii SQE + MVA module.
